title: Centre for Energy and Materials - Home
text: Centre for Energy and MaterialsCentre for Energy and MaterialsDriving initiatives and coalitions to ensure that the energy transition is sustainable, secure, and equitable.Accelerating transition to secure, sustainable and equitable energy and materials systemsOur purpose is to bring together leaders from companies and countries to create insights, shape solutions and engage in high impact collaboration to accelerate energy and materials transitions.We strive to accelerate the transition to a secure, sustainable, and equitable energy system that enables positive economic and social development.300+Business partners 10Global initiatives450Global leaders engagedOur initiatives on energy and materialsFuture of Power SystemsAccelerating power system transformation through innovation and finance to meet growing energy demand, creating a power system that drives economic growth while advancing affordability, sustainability and energy security.Transitioning Industrial ClustersSupports collaboration and the development of a shared vision among co-located companies and public institutions, with the goals of driving economic growth, employment and reducing CO2 emissions.Securing Minerals for Energy and TechnologiesAdvances collaboration to strengthen the resilience of minerals, promote responsible development and mobilize finance for global mineral value chains.Join us in shaping the future of energy and materialsWe believe that progress happens by bringing people together. People from all walks of life, who have the drive and the influence to make a positive change. Be part of that change and join our community.World Economic Forum CentresThe world is confronted with a range of unprecedented challenges, and it's crucial for businesses, government, and civil society to work together to find common solutions and take decisive action.Through its Centres, the Forum integrates public-private efforts to achieve greater impact.Centre for Energy and MaterialsPowered by© 2026 All rights reservedPrivacy Policy & Terms of Service
